{ "name": "binary-extensions", "version": "2.3.0", "description": "List of binary file extensions", "license": "MIT", "repository": "sindresorhus/binary-extensions", "funding": "https://github.com/sponsors/sindresorhus", "author": { "name": "Sindre Sorhus", "email": "sindresorhus@gmail.com", "url": "https://sindresorhus.com" }, "sideEffects": false, "engines": { "node": ">=8" }, "scripts": { "test": "xo && ava && tsd" }, "files": [ "index.js", "index.d.ts", "binary-extensions.json", "binary-extensions.json.d.ts" ], "keywords": [ "binary", "extensions", "extension", "file", "json", "list", "array" ], "devDependencies": { "ava": "^1.4.1", "tsd": "^0.7.2", "xo": "^0.24.0" } }
